questions.question: What does "悖论" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Paradox

questions.question: What does "颠覆" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Overthrow

questions.question: What does "融贯" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Coherent

questions.question: What does "二元对立" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Binary opposition

questions.question: What does "形而上" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Metaphysical

questions.question: What does "诗性" mean in English?
questions.correct_answer: Poetic quality

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这一论断看似自洽，实则___着内在的___。
questions.correct_answer: 隐含...悖论

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 后现代主义___了传统的叙事方式。
questions.correct_answer: 颠覆

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这个理论虽然在局部上有说服力，但整体上缺乏___。
questions.correct_answer: 融贯性

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 我们需要超越___，去寻求更深层的理解。
questions.correct_answer: 二元对立

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 这部作品融合了形而上的思考与___的表现。
questions.correct_answer: 诗性

questions.question: Complete the sentence: 他的论述___了多个维度的相互关联性。
questions.correct_answer: 揭示

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: This apparent contradiction precisely reflects a deeper paradox
questions.correct_answer: This apparent contradiction precisely reflects a deeper paradox
questions.audio: 这个表面上的矛盾恰恰反映了一个更深层的悖论

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: Heidegger attempted to overthrow the Cartesian dualist tradition
questions.correct_answer: Heidegger attempted to overthrow the Cartesian dualist tradition
questions.audio: 海德格尔试图颠覆笛卡尔的二元论传统

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: We must go beyond the existing binary opposition framework
questions.correct_answer: We must go beyond the existing binary opposition framework
questions.audio: 我们必须超越既有的二元对立框架

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: This text has both metaphysical depth and poetic vitality
questions.correct_answer: This text has both metaphysical depth and poetic vitality
questions.audio: 这个文本既具有形而上的深度，又保有诗性的生命力

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: The entire argumentative system lacks internal coherence
questions.correct_answer: The entire argumentative system lacks internal coherence
questions.audio: 整个论证体系缺乏内在的融贯性

questions.question: Listen and choose what you heard.
options: The limitation of this oppositional thinking is that it ignores the complexity of phenomena
questions.correct_answer: The limitation of this oppositional thinking is that it ignores the complexity of phenomena
questions.audio: 这种对立思维的局限性在于它忽视了现象的复杂性

questions.question: Translate to target language: "This apparent contradiction conceals a fundamental paradox"
options: 这个表面的矛盾隐含着一个根本的悖论
questions.correct_answer: 这个表面的矛盾隐含着一个根本的悖论

questions.question: Translate to target language: "Deconstruction as a method fundamentally overthrows traditional hermeneutics"
options: 解构主义支持传统解释学
解构作为一种方法从根本上颠覆了传统的解释学
questions.correct_answer: 解构作为一种方法从根本上颠覆了传统的解释学

questions.question: Translate to target language: "We must transcend the binary opposition between subject and object"
options: 我们必须超越主体与客体之间的二元对立
questions.correct_answer: 我们必须超越主体与客体之间的二元对立

questions.question: Translate to target language: "The metaphysical dimension of this work reveals both philosophical rigor and poetic resonance"
options: 这部作品的形而上维度既呈现哲学的严谨，又具有诗性的共鸣
questions.correct_answer: 这部作品的形而上维度既呈现哲学的严谨，又具有诗性的共鸣

questions.question: Translate to target language: "The lack of internal coherence undermines the entire argumentative framework"
options: 缺乏内在的融贯性破坏了整个论证框架
questions.correct_answer: 缺乏内在的融贯性破坏了整个论证框架

questions.question: Translate to target language: "By interrogating the premises of binary thinking, we can reveal its limitations"
options: 通过质疑二元思维的前提，我们可以揭示其局限性
questions.correct_answer: 通过质疑二元思维的前提，我们可以揭示其局限性

questions.question: 在形而上学的讨论中，「悖论」最准确的含义是：
options: 一个表面上自相矛盾但可能蕴含深层真理的论述
questions.correct_answer: 一个表面上自相矛盾但可能蕴含深层真理的论述

questions.question: 讨论后现代主义对既有观念的态度，正确的是：
options: 后现代主义接受所有传统
后现代主义颠覆了许多既有的文化和哲学假设
questions.correct_answer: 后现代主义颠覆了许多既有的文化和哲学假设

questions.question: 论证一个理论的弱点时，你可能会指出它：
options: 在各个方面都融贯一致
questions.correct_answer: 缺乏内在的融贯性

questions.question: 关于「二元对立」的理解，现代哲学倾向于：
options: 二元对立是永恒的真理
我们应该超越二元对立去看到更复杂的现实
questions.correct_answer: 我们应该超越二元对立去看到更复杂的现实

questions.question: 一部既有深邃的哲学思想，又有美的艺术表达的作品，可以描述为：
options: 既有形而上的思考，又具有诗性的生命力
questions.correct_answer: 既有形而上的思考，又具有诗性的生命力

questions.question: 批判一种思维方式的局限性时，你可能会论证它：
options: 忽视了现象的复杂性，建立在简化的二元假设上
questions.correct_answer: 忽视了现象的复杂性，建立在简化的二元假设上
